name: Glare Card
description: A card component with a glossy glare/shine effect that moves with the cursor, simulating a reflective surface like a holographic card.
whenToUse: Use for premium product showcases, membership cards, or featured content where you want a reflective, high-end look.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render inside the glare card

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the card
